findings.description: PascalCase class names `RequestThreadLoopHandler` and `DbConnectionManagementHandler` are referenced in s1 content (exclusive-use warning and related handlers table) but are absent from s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source 概要: ':doc:`TransactionManagementHandler` および :doc:`RequestThreadLoopHandler` とは排他利用' and related handler table listing :doc:`DbConnectionManagementHandler`

findings.description: The automated check reports 6 source headings vs 3 knowledge sections, but the source actually contains only 3 real h2 sections (概要, ハンドラ処理フロー, 設定項目・拡張ポイント). The `++++++` lines are decorative separators without associated heading text, not real RST headings. The 3-section structure is correct and this warning is a false positive.
findings.source_evidence: Source file has three `------` underlined headings: 概要, ハンドラ処理フロー, 設定項目・拡張ポイント. The `++++++++++++` and `++++++++++++++++++++` lines have no text above or below them as heading text.
